race.comment: SATIN AND CASH (13) comes back a few levels today and is now in the Samantha McGuren stable. Held her position second-up with a plugging fifth over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Rates highly over this trip and expected to go close. ENGLISH CONQUEROR (2) has a host of gear changes for this and can get off the mark at start seven. Ran on late with a handy fourth over 1200m at Warwick. Maps well and expected to figure prominently. BOOMTIME NOW (1) sat on the speed first-up with a narrow fifth over 870m at Toowoomba. Will take a lot from that hit-out and looks a strong chance from the gate. SUNSET ROYALE (14) mixing her form and assess on the eye catching fourth two-back over 1000m at Wagga. Keep safe at the each way price.
